cards.name: Shield
rules_text: Shields require the Utilize action to Don or Doff. You gain the Armor Class benefit of a Shield only if you have training with it
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Bulwark of Enduring Mercy
rules_text: A heavy dwarven shield that must be wielded with two hands. You gain an additional +3 bonus to AC, but cannot use another shield or any weapon requiring a free hand.
Sanctuary of Suffering (1/Long Rest): Reaction → grant Resistance to a creature within 10 ft when it takes damage.
Martyr’s Endurance (1/Long Rest): Drop to 1 HP instead of 0.
cards.flavor_text: Forged in prayer and patience, it was made for one whose arms may fail — but whose compassion must never falter.
cards.author: wschu
